organic-the-hidden-truth-about-ofw-remit.hook: The hidden truth about OFW remittance fees — they're stealing from your family 🧵

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Face-to-camera, emotional open — 'Your family in the Philippines is supposed to get $500. How much do they actually receive?' | Beat 2 (9-25s): Phone screen record showing a traditional wire transfer fee breakdown — $15 fee + 3% FX spread = $30 gone | Beat 3 (26-45s): Split screen showing same $500 sent via Speed Wallet arriving in full, zero fees, under 60 seconds | Beat 4 (46-60s): CTA — 'Download Speed Wallet, link in bio. Send every peso they deserve.'
payload.production_notes: Film talking-head in natural light; use iPhone screen record for the fee comparison — no graphics needed. Add captions via CapCut. Tag #OFW #remittance #philippines for discovery boost.

organic-let-s-clear-the-confusion-you-do.hook: Let's clear the confusion: ❌ You do NOT need a bank account to send money home

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Text-on-screen hook with bold red X graphic, creator reacts with surprise face | Beat 2 (7-20s): List 3 myths debunked in rapid fire: 'You need a US bank ❌ / It takes 3-5 days ❌ / You pay fees ❌' — each with quick cut | Beat 3 (21-45s): Screen record of downloading Speed Wallet, creating account in 60 seconds, sending $100 to Mexico — real-time | Beat 4 (46-60s): Creator back on camera — 'Zero fees. Instant. No bank required. Link below.'
payload.production_notes: Shoot myth list as text-on-screen using CapCut template for fast cuts. Screen record must show real app UI. Keep energy high between cuts. Spanish subtitle overlay optional for reach.

organic-i-invested-1-000-in-bitcoin-last.hook: I invested $1,000 in Bitcoin last year. Here's what I wish someone told me first 👇

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Creator holds phone to camera showing a crypto price chart — 'Everyone's talking about Bitcoin. I was scared to start. Here's what actually happened.' | Beat 2 (8-25s): Honest story — bought BTC through a complicated exchange, paid fees, waited days. 'There had to be a better way.' | Beat 3 (26-48s): Screen record of Speed Wallet — download, receive first Bitcoin, send $5 to a friend instantly. 'This is how I actually use Bitcoin now — like cash.' | Beat 4 (49-60s): 'No charts. No trading. Just send and receive. Download link below.'
payload.production_notes: Authentic, slightly imperfect delivery builds trust with crypto-curious audience. Use price chart B-roll from public domain. Screen record must be clean — rehearse the app flow before filming.

organic-families-in-mexico-aren-t-gettin.hook: Families in Mexico aren't getting the full amount — here's why and how to fix it

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Empathy open — 'If you're sending money to family in Mexico, they might not be getting everything you send. Not your fault — the system is broken.' | Beat 2 (9-28s): Quick explainer: traditional remittance companies take fees on both ends — sending fee AND unfavorable exchange rate on arrival | Beat 3 (29-48s): Solution reveal — Speed Wallet sends over Bitcoin Lightning, no middleman, family receives full amount in local currency via partner cash-out | Beat 4 (49-60s): 'Try it today — send $1 to a friend right now. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Creator should speak with genuine empathy — this is an emotional topic. Film in a home setting for authenticity. Consider recruiting a bilingual creator for Spanish-language version to double reach.

organic-pov-you-just-won-on-a-crypto-cas.hook: POV: You just won on a crypto casino and your withdrawal hits in 3 seconds 🤯

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Screen record POV of an iGaming withdrawal screen, finger taps 'withdraw', amount leaves instantly | Beat 2 (6-20s): Cut to Speed Wallet notification sound — balance updated. Creator reaction: 'Did that just… already?' | Beat 3 (21-40s): Voiceover explains: 'Most platforms make you wait 3-5 days. With Bitcoin Lightning via Speed Wallet, it's instant. No holds. No verification delays for withdrawals.' | Beat 4 (41-60s): Show Speed Wallet balance, send $20 to a friend as a flex. 'This is the only wallet I use for gaming. Download below.'
payload.production_notes: Use a compliant iGaming platform that supports Lightning for the screen record. Add a sound effect on the notification for dopamine hit. Keep disclaimer text small at bottom per platform policy. Post between 8-11pm when gaming audience is active.

paid-your-family-is-losing-30-every-time.hook: Your family is losing $30 every time you send money home. Here's proof.
paid-your-family-is-losing-30-every-time.estimate: $1.80–$2.60 (below $3.17 benchmark — high-intent emotional pain point with specific loss quantification drives strong CTR and conversion)

payload.problem: Screen record of a Western Union or MoneyGram fee summary — $15 transfer fee plus 3% FX markup on a $500 send. Voiceover: 'That's $30 gone before your family sees a single dollar. On a $500 send. Every single time.'
payload.solution: Speed Wallet screen record — same $500 send, fee line reads $0.00, delivery time reads 'instant'. Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Arrives in seconds. Your family gets every dollar you send.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet free. Send your first transfer today.
payload.audience: Meta — Facebook + Instagram. Targeting: Hispanic/Latino US diaspora 22-45, interests: international money transfer, Western Union, remittances, Philippines/Mexico/Guatemala. Lookalike: existing remittance app users.

paid-i-tried-bitcoin-for-the-first-time-.hook: I tried Bitcoin for the first time. It took 47 seconds.
paid-i-tried-bitcoin-for-the-first-time-.estimate: $2.40–$3.00 (near benchmark — curiosity gap hook + social proof of simplicity reduces install friction; TikTok crypto-curious audience is large but requires strong creative refresh cadence)

payload.problem: Creator on camera: 'Everyone told me Bitcoin was complicated — wallets, seed phrases, exchanges. I tried three apps and gave up every time. Then my friend sent me this.' Cuts to a confusing competitor onboarding screen for 2 seconds.
payload.solution: Speed Wallet screen record — download, account created, receive $5 of Bitcoin from a friend, send it back. Timer overlay shows 47 seconds total. Creator: 'That's it. No exchange. No ID verification nightmare. Just Bitcoin that works like Venmo.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Get your first Bitcoin in under a minute.
payload.audience: TikTok — ages 21-34, interests: personal finance, fintech, Coinbase, Cash App, crypto for beginners. Behavioral: recently searched 'how to buy Bitcoin', 'crypto wallet'. Exclude: existing crypto power users.

paid-casino-withdrawal-stuck-for-5-days-.hook: Casino withdrawal stuck for 5 days? This is how pro players actually move money.
paid-casino-withdrawal-stuck-for-5-days-.estimate: $3.00–$4.20 (at or slightly above benchmark — iGaming audience has high LTV which justifies CPI premium; creative should be A/B tested with and without the withdrawal delay pain point to optimize)

payload.problem: Text-on-screen rapid cuts: 'Pending… Pending… Pending…' on a withdrawal screen. Voiceover: 'Standard crypto casino withdrawals can take days. Holds, verification queues, weekend delays. That's your money, sitting there.'
payload.solution: Speed Wallet Lightning deposit and withdrawal demo — funds in within 3 seconds shown with live timer. Voiceover: 'Bitcoin Lightning settles in seconds, not days. Deposit instantly. Withdraw instantly. Speed Wallet is the wallet serious players use for Lightning-enabled casinos.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Instant in, instant out.
payload.audience: Meta — Facebook + Instagram. Targeting: 25-44 male, interests: online poker, sports betting, crypto gambling, casino apps, DraftKings. Geo: US states where iGaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, NV, CO, IL). Exclude: problem gambling sensitivity flags per Meta policy.
